# Transcrição: 01-Introduction

## [00:00 - 01:19]

This is D-Pesh and welcome to Building Your Offer. Now, you may look at this and say, well, I just want to jump straight to my ad account. What does it offer got to do with running Facebook ads, profiting and scaling? Let me tell you that if that's your mindset, then this could be the reason why you're maybe not getting the performance you need or want from Facebook ads. Because so many people dive straight into the platform, but I learned from years of mistake and then years of making this stuff work that success comes from your offer. And as I'll explain in this module, the offer isn't about discounts or promotion. The offer is what bridges your product or service with your audience and pushes them into your funnel to then convert. And that's why I want to break out to you in this section, which is the most fundamental part of making your Facebook ads campaign work is really connecting your consumer with your product and service. So I want you to come into this with an open mind. Don't think that, you know, I need to go straight into ads manager, start testing multiple creatives and different audiences and things like that. Because if you just spend a little bit of time doing the planning and the research and building your campaign, it will give you the stability, the profitability and the scalability that you're looking for.
